questions.question_text: Write Short Notes on following: CO Mapping a Bill 2.5 b Regulations 2.5 c Act 2.5 d Property Rights 2.5 e Property Tax 2.5 f Building Byelaws 2.5 g What is a Non-Governmental Organization ? 2.5 h Good Governance 2.5
